# Woof-Fit

Woof-Fit is a premium dog-human fitness and bonding brand founded by Sarit Netanel, a Certified Personal Trainer and Certified Canine Fitness Trainer. The brand occupies a unique niche — not dog training, not solo human fitness — but a guided workout series where owner and dog train simultaneously, building fitness, focus, confidence, and a deeper bond through shared movement. The brand voice is warm, expert, approachable, and slightly playful, with a Peloton-meets-sun-drenched-park-weekend aesthetic. The tagline 'Train Together. Bond Forever.' is sacred and never modified. Visual identity leans into golden-hour outdoor lifestyle photography featuring athletic dog breeds and relatable humans aged 25–55, with a warm earthy color palette and the 🐾 paw print used sparingly as a brand signature.

Source: https://woof-fit-e913acf3.zappy5.app

---

## Sweat, Play &amp; Bond With Your Dog — Woof-Fit

URL: https://woof-fit-e913acf3.zappy5.app
Description: Discover the premier health and fitness experience where you and your dog train together. Build strength, confidence, and an unbreakable bond through guided, joyful workouts.

Sweat, Play & Bond With Your Dog — Woof-Fit

🐾 Woof-Fit


# Train Together.Bond Forever.


### Woof-Fit helps people and dogs move, focus, and build confidence together through guided dog-human workouts designed for real life.



Start Your Free Workout
Explore the Program



Beginner-friendly • No fancy equipment • Built for real dogs and real people


Created by a Certified Personal Trainer and Certified Canine Fitness Trainer














## Your dog wants more than another walk, and you want something you can actually stick with.


Most fitness routines leave the family member who's always ready to move sitting on the sidelines. Woof-Fit is simple guided movement designed for both of you — building enrichment, focus, and a deeper bond through shared training that feels like play, not a chore.







70%

of a dog's strength, balance, and coordination goes untrained in daily life — leaving them physically under-stimulated and mentally restless.













### More Movement


Guided exercises that activate muscles your dog never uses on a leash walk. Real physical engagement that leaves you both happily tired.









### More Focus


Shared movement builds mental clarity for both of you. Structured sessions channel your dog's energy into calm, attentive partnership.









### More Connection


Every session is a conversation. You learn to read each other, build trust, and turn fitness into the highlight of your day together.




















## Fitness for humans, enrichment for dogs, bonding for both.


Woof-Fit is guided movement and simple training structure — a premier health and fitness experience where you and your dog train side by side. No complicated drills, no pressure. Just clear, joyful workouts that build strength, focus, and an unshakeable bond.



- Dog-human workouts

- Foundational skills module

- Confidence building

- Beginner-friendly structure

- At-home or outdoor friendly

- Positive bond-based approach




Start Your Free Workout












Free Preview

### Try Workout #1


A complete 20-minute session with Sarit guiding you and your dog through foundational movements. No equipment needed — just you, your pup, and a little space.





Full Series




### Build & Bond Series


Videos 2 through 6 progressively layer skills, duration, and teamwork. Each session builds on the last, creating a complete fitness journey for both of you.





Bonus




### Foundational Skills Tutorial


Short, focused lessons on positioning, cues, and safety so every movement feels natural. Perfect for first-timers and refreshers alike.




















Why Woof-Fit

## Built for the bond, not just the workout.


Woof-Fit is a premier health and fitness experience where you and your dog move as one. Every session is designed to strengthen your routine, build confidence, and deepen the connection that makes you an unbeatable team.











### Move Together


Guided workouts where you and your dog exercise side by side. No waiting, no watching — just shared movement that builds fitness for both of you.









### Build Confidence


Structured progressions help your dog gain focus and self-assurance. You will feel stronger and more capable — together.









### Strengthen Your Routine


Consistency is everything. Woof-Fit turns your daily walk into a purposeful session you both look forward to.









### Support Mental Enrichment


Physical exercise and mental stimulation go hand in hand. Our sequences challenge your dog's brain, reducing boredom and promoting calm, focused behavior at home.









### No Perfect Dog Required


Reactive, excitable, or just easily distracted? Our methods meet your dog where they are and build from there.









### Feel Closer


Shared movement creates a language of trust. You will notice a deeper bond that carries into every part of your life together.







No perfect dog and no athlete required. You and your dog can start exactly where you are — and grow together from the very first session.













## ready to move, bond, and build together?


start with the first workout free and see how Woof-Fit can help build a healthier, happier routine.





Certified Trainers



Safe & Gentle Methods



Proven Results




Start Your Free Workout
Unlock the Full Series



no equipment, no perfection, just you and your dog












Move together. Stay wild. Woof-Fit brings outdoor wellness to you and your pack.

## Meet the Trainer Who Keeps You Both Moving — Woof-Fit

URL: https://woof-fit-e913acf3.zappy5.app/about
Description: Learn how founder Sarit Netanel blends certified personal training with canine fitness expertise to help you evolve health and fitness as a team. Real connection starts here.

Meet the Trainer Who Keeps You Both Moving — Woof-Fit






























Skip to main content















- Home
- About Woof-Fit
- Programs
- Contact Us



Contact Us












# The Person Behindthe Program


Woof-Fit was built from a genuine belief that movement strengthens the bond between person and dog. It's not about perfect obedience or gym-level intensity — it's about showing up together, finding your shared rhythm, and discovering that the best workout partner already has four paws and a wagging tail.


Sarit Netanel — Founder & Lead Trainer








Certified Personal Trainer





Certified Canine Fitness Trainer




























## Sarit Netanel





Sarit Netanel is a Certified Personal Trainer and Certified Canine Fitness Trainer who has spent over a decade blending human movement science with the joyful energy of dogs. Her journey didn’t start in a gym — it started in the park, with her own rescue dog, Leo, who reminded her that the best workouts are the ones you share.


As a premier health and fitness expert, Sarit brings a unique dual certification to every Woof-Fit session. She doesn’t just teach exercises; she designs intentional, safe, and deeply engaging movement experiences where both ends of the leash grow stronger, more confident, and more connected. Her approach is warm, positive, and rooted in the belief that fitness should never feel like a chore — it should feel like quality time with your best friend.


Through Woof-Fit, Sarit is on a mission to help dog-human pairs evolve health and fitness together. She believes that when you train alongside your dog, you’re not just building muscle — you’re building trust, communication, and a bond that lasts a lifetime. Every workout is crafted to meet you where you are, whether you’re a seasoned athlete or just starting your fitness journey.










### Dual-Certified Expertise


Certified in both personal training and canine fitness, ensuring every movement is safe and effective for both you and your dog.







### Positive & Intentional


A teaching style rooted in encouragement, patience, and celebrating small wins — for both species.







### Meaningful Connection


Every workout is designed to deepen the bond between dog and human through shared, joyful movement.














## Why Woof-Fit Exists





Most fitness programs are built for humans. Most dog programs are built for dogs. Woof-Fit is built for both of you — together. Because movement shared isn't just exercise; it's a conversation in trust, a rhythm of confidence, and a moment of pure, focused joy that a standard walk can only hint at.



We believe the bond between a person and their dog is one of the most powerful relationships we can nurture. Woof-Fit transforms that relationship into a ritual — a guided, intentional practice where you both grow stronger, calmer, and more connected, side by side.





Train together. Bond forever. It's not just our tagline — it's the heartbeat of every workout we design, every move we teach, and every story we hear from this incredible community.


— Sarit Netanel, Founder of Woof-Fit













### ready to train together?


Take the first step toward a stronger, healthier bond with your dog. Join thousands of owners who have discovered the joy of shared movement — no special equipment needed, just you, your pup, and a few minutes a day.


Start Your Free Workout
Explore the Build & Bond Series
















Move together. Stay wild. Woof-Fit brings outdoor wellness to you and your pack.

## Find Your Pack&#39;s Perfect Workout — Woof-Fit

URL: https://woof-fit-e913acf3.zappy5.app/programs
Description: Explore signature programs designed for every fitness level, from high-energy interval sessions to mindful movement. Your premier health and fitness journey together begins now.

Find Your Pack's Perfect Workout — Woof-Fit

Contact Us









Programs

# Build & Bond Series


6 guided workouts and one foundational skills tutorial designed for owner and dog together.







Beginner-Friendly





~30 Minutes Each





At-Home or Outdoor













## Inside the Program


A structured journey designed to build fitness, confidence, and a deeper bond — one session at a time.









Free Preview






### Video 1: The Woof-Fit Warm-Up


Start your journey with this complimentary full-length session. Experience the Woof-Fit method firsthand — gentle mobility flows, foundational cues, and the joy of moving in sync with your dog.


- Learn the core Woof-Fit rhythm and positioning

- Build initial trust and focus with your dog

- Assess your starting fitness level together

- Full 25-minute guided session — no equipment needed


Start Your Free Workout →







Full Access






### Videos 2–6: The Full Series


Progress through five carefully sequenced sessions that build on each other. Each video introduces new movement patterns, increases complexity, and deepens the teamwork between you and your dog.


- Video 2: Balance & Body Awareness

- Video 3: Strength Foundations

- Video 4: Coordination & Flow

- Video 5: Endurance & Consistency

- Video 6: The Bonded Workout — full integration



Each session runs approximately 30 minutes and requires minimal space. Designed for all fitness levels and dog breeds.

Unlock the Full Series →







Full Access






### Foundational Skills Tutorial


An essential primer that sets you both up for success. Before diving into the full workouts, master the key positions, cues, and safety techniques that make every session effective and enjoyable.


- Proper stance and alignment for you and your dog

- Positive reinforcement timing and treat placement

- Reading your dog's body language during exercise

- Creating a safe, distraction-free workout zone



This tutorial is included with full course access and recommended before starting Video 2.

Unlock the Full Series →







🔒 Locked modules are included with full course access. Start with the free preview to experience the Woof-Fit difference.














## What the series helps you build.


Woof-Fit is designed for real life — not a perfectly trained dog, not a gym membership, not a fitness background. Just you, your dog, and a few minutes a day to move together. Every workout in the series layers movement, focus, confidence, and enrichment into a simple, repeatable ritual that transforms your bond from the inside out.


No fitness background needed. No perfectly trained dog required. Just show up, and we'll guide you both from the very first session.













### Shared Movement


Build functional fitness for both species through guided, simultaneous exercises — no equipment needed.











### Mental Focus


Strengthen your dog's impulse control and your own mindfulness through structured, engaging routines.











### Confidence Building


Watch your dog grow bolder and more self-assured as they master new challenges alongside you.











### Consistent Routine


Create a calming daily ritual that both you and your dog look forward to — structure that reduces anxiety and builds trust.











### Mental Enrichment


Engage your dog's brain with novel movement patterns and problem-solving sequences woven into every session.











### Deep Connection


Forge an unbreakable bond through shared accomplishment, eye contact, and synchronized movement — the heart of Woof-Fit.


















## Unlock the Full Build & Bond Series







### Build & Bond Series Full Access


$119
$79


Limited-time launch pricing — secure your spot today






#### What's Included


- All 6 guided workout videos

- Foundational skills tutorial

- Beginner-friendly progressive exercises

- Lifetime access — revisit anytime

- No equipment needed — just you and your dog






Unlock the Full Series for $79

Start with the free preview and unlock when ready.

















## Questions? We Have Answers.





**Q: What equipment do I need to get started?**



One of the best parts about Woof-Fit is its simplicity. You don't need a gym membership or heavy equipment. We recommend a yoga mat for you, a comfortable harness and leash for your dog (no retractable leashes, please), and some high-value treats. That's it. We designed every workout to be done in your living room, backyard, or local park.






**Q: Does my dog need to have prior training?**



Not at all. While your dog should know basic cues like "sit" and "stay," Woof-Fit is designed to meet both of you where you are. Our guided workouts naturally reinforce calm, focused behavior. Many members tell us their dog's impulse control and confidence improved dramatically simply by doing the program consistently. This is bonding first, training second.






**Q: Is there a free trial available?**



Absolutely. We want you to feel the connection before committing. You can start with a full, no-strings-attached free workout video. This gives you and your dog a chance to experience the rhythm, the coaching style, and the joy of training together. No credit card required.






**Q: What happens after the free video?**



Once you've completed your free workout, you'll receive an invitation to unlock the full Woof-Fit course library. There's zero pressure. The free session is genuinely valuable on its own, but if you're ready to build a consistent, life-changing routine together, the complete series is waiting for you.






**Q: What is included in the full course?**



The full Woof-Fit series includes a progressive library of follow-along workout videos, each structured around a specific fitness and bonding goal. You'll get warm-ups, strength and mobility flows, cool-downs, and exclusive "park session" bonuses. Every workout is led by Sarit, a Certified Personal Trainer and Certified Canine Fitness Trainer, ensuring both of you are safe and challenged.






**Q: I'm a complete beginner. Is this right for me?**



Yes, and you're exactly who we built this for. Woof-Fit is not about extreme athleticism; it's about consistent, joyful movement. Modifications are always offered, and the pace is encouraging, never punishing. If you can get down on the floor with your dog, you can do this. This is your premier health and fitness journey, shared with your best friend.






**Q: How long is each workout?**



Most workouts range between 20 and 35 minutes. We find this is the sweet spot for maintaining both human and canine focus while delivering real fitness benefits. It's long enough to feel accomplished, but short enough to fit into a busy morning or lunch break.






**Q: Where can we do the workouts?**



Anywhere you have a safe, flat surface. Most members train indoors in their living room or a spare room, but a grassy backyard or a quiet corner of the park works beautifully. As long as you have your phone or tablet to follow along, you've got a health and fitness center wherever you and your dog are together.
















Move together. Stay wild. Woof-Fit brings outdoor wellness to you and your pack.

Get in Touch

# We'd love to hear from you.


Have a question about the program, the workouts, or how Woof-Fit can fit into your life with your dog? Our team is ready to help you get started on your shared fitness journey. Whether you're curious about the moves, the membership, or just want to say hi — drop us a note. We read every message and we always write back.





Reach us on Instagram at  @woof_fit












## send a message.



Name



Email



Phone



Message





I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy


Send Message


we will get back to you as soon as possible.













## We're here to help.


Not sure if Woof-Fit is right for you and your dog? Wondering how to get started or have questions about the program? We'd love to hear from you. Whether you're curious about the workout format, need help choosing the right course, or just want to say hi, reach out and we'll guide you every step of the way.


Our team is passionate about helping you and your pup build a stronger bond through shared movement. No question is too small — if it matters to you, it matters to us.











### Program Questions


Curious about workout intensity, equipment needs, or how the sessions work? We've got answers.

Send us a message  →








### Media & Partnerships


Interested in featuring Woof-Fit, collaborating, or exploring partnership opportunities? We're all ears.

Get in touch  →








### Join the Pack


Follow @woof_fit on Instagram for daily inspiration, workout snippets, and community stories from dogs and their humans.

@woof_fit  →

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://woof-fit-e913acf3.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

- Home

Contact Us








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/23/2026



Woof-Fit ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Woof-Fit

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://woof-fit-e913acf3.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- About Woof-Fit
- Programs
- Contact Us



Contact Us








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 23, 2026



Woof-Fit is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Woof-Fit

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

- Home

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 23, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Woof-Fit

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Health & Fitness provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Woof-Fit provides Health & Fitness through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Woof-Fit. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Woof-Fit

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
